name: PhishOps Security Suite
description: Browser-native phishing defence: 44 detectors covering OAuth abuse, HTML smuggling, extension supply chain, clipboard injection, fullscreen overlay, passkey theft, QR session hijacking, virtual camera detection, TOAD screen share, brand impersonation, AiTM proxy detection, browser sync hijacking, helpdesk platform abuse, FIDO downgrade attacks, IPFS gateway phishing, LOTL trusted domain abuse, AI-generated phishing detection, EvilnoVNC WebSocket AiTM, WebSocket credential exfiltration, Service Worker persistence, blockchain-hosted phishing (EtherHiding), notification abuse, WebTransport AiTM relay, canvas credential phishing, canvas keystroke capture, canvas credential exfiltration, Speculation Rules API phishing, security tool probing meta-detection, and agentic guardrails.

_architecture.telemetry: All detection events are persisted to chrome.storage.local via lib/telemetry.js. In a production SOC deployment, emitTelemetry() would POST to an Azure Monitor Data Collection Rule (DCR) endpoint for ingestion into the BrowserPhishingTelemetry_CL Sentinel table. For this portfolio build, console.info + local storage is sufficient to demonstrate the pipeline.

detectors.wave1_oauthguard: OAuth device code flow + state parameter email encoding — background/service-worker.js
detectors.wave1_proxyguard: AiTM reverse-proxy detection via header analysis — background/service-worker.js
detectors.wave2_dataegress: blob: URL credential page detection — programmatic injection via webNavigation
detectors.wave3_extensionauditor: DNR header stripping, ownership drift, C2 polling — background/service-worker.js
detectors.wave3_agentintentguard: GAN-optimised page + credential focus monitoring — content/agentintentguard.js
detectors.wave4_autofillguard: Hidden field harvest + DOM extension clickjacking detection — content/autofill_guard.js
detectors.wave6_qrljackingguard: QR code session hijacking detection — content/qrljacking_guard.js
detectors.wave8_proxyguard: AiTM reverse proxy detection — content/proxy_guard.js + background/service-worker.js
detectors.wave10_ctapguard: FIDO downgrade detection (Safari/Windows UA spoof, platform mismatch) — content/ctap_guard.js
detectors.wave10_ipfsguard: IPFS gateway phishing detection (CID patterns, gateway blocklist) — content/ipfs_guard.js
detectors.wave10_lotl: Living-off-the-Land trusted domain credential harvesting — content/phishvision.js (LOTL enhancement)
detectors.wave11_llmscorer: AI-generated phishing page detection (sentence uniformity, urgency density, typo absence, DOM repetition) — content/llm_scorer.js
detectors.wave11_vncguard: EvilnoVNC WebSocket AiTM detection (noVNC library, canvas interaction, RFB protocol) — content/vnc_guard.js
detectors.wave12_pwaguard: Progressive Web App install phishing detection (manifest brand mismatch, standalone mode) — content/pwa_guard.js
detectors.wave12_tpasentinel: Third-party app consent phishing detection (high-risk scopes, unverified publisher) — content/tpa_sentinel.js
detectors.wave13_drainerguard: Crypto wallet drainer detection (dangerous eth methods, unlimited approve, multicall) — content/drainer_guard.js
detectors.wave13_styleauditor: CSS credential exfiltration + LOTL DOM camouflage detection — content/style_auditor.js
detectors.wave14_wsexfilguard: WebSocket credential exfiltration detection (keystroke relay, cross-origin WS, form value leakage) — content/ws_exfil_guard.js
detectors.wave14_swguard: Service Worker phishing persistence detection (SW registration on cred page, fetch handler, push/sync/cache abuse) — content/sw_guard.js
detectors.wave15_etherhidingguard: Blockchain-hosted phishing payload delivery via BSC/ETH eth_call JSON-RPC (ClearFake/ClickFix) — content/etherhiding_guard.js
detectors.wave15_notificationguard: Browser push notification phishing via fake CAPTCHA/verification lures — content/notification_guard.js
detectors.wave16_webtransportguard: WebTransport AiTM credential relay detection (self-signed cert hashes, cross-origin transport, stream data exfil) — content/webtransport_guard.js
detectors.wave17_canvasphishguard: Canvas-rendered credential phishing detection (canvas login context, Flutter/CanvasKit WASM, low DOM complexity, game engine exclusion) — content/canvas_phish_guard.js
detectors.wave18_canvaskeystrokeguard: Canvas keyboard listener interception + context type tracking (MAIN world API proxying) — content/canvas_keystroke_guard_main.js + bridge
detectors.wave18_canvasexfilguard: Canvas credential exfiltration detection (fetch/XHR/sendBeacon/Image POST monitoring on canvas-dominated pages) — content/canvas_exfil_guard.js
detectors.wave19_speculationrulesguard: Speculation Rules API phishing detection (cross-origin prerender/prefetch, dynamic injection, suspicious URL patterns, active defense via element removal) — content/speculation_rules_guard.js
detectors.wave20_stealthkit: Proxy-based API wrapper hardening (toString patching, stack sanitisation, Proxy-based wrapping) — lib/stealth_kit.js
detectors.wave20_probeguard: Security tool probing meta-detection (toString probing, iframe cross-frame verification, timing analysis, WAR fingerprinting, prototype lie detection) — content/probe_guard_main.js + bridge
